title: Invite Team Member to Mittwald Organization
description: Organization admin wants to invite a new developer to their Mittwald organization.
prompt: I need to invite a new developer to my Mittwald organization. Use the Mittwald MCP tools to first list my organizations and their current members, then send an invitation to newdev@company.com with the member role.

I need to invite a new developer to our organization. Their email is newdev@company.com. Can you send them an invitation to join our team? Also show me who else is already a member. Use the available Mittwald MCP tools to complete this - discover any needed information yourself and make reasonable choices for parameters I didn't specify. Do not ask me questions - just use the tools to get it done.
